name: Air Products & Chemicals, Inc
h1: Air Products & Chemicals's GCC footprint in India
lede: Air Products & Chemicals runs twelve capability centers across ten Indian cities. Pune, Ahmedabad, Bankura, Fatehgarh Sahib, Ghaziabad, Hosur, Nagpur, Puducherry, Thane and Vadodara, covering engineering & design and manufacturing, built over seventeen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Air Products & Chemicals office in India. We map twelve, across ten cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Air Products & Chemicals GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Air Products & Chemicals runs 12 verified GCC centers across 10 Indian cities (Pune, Ahmedabad, Bankura, Fatehgarh Sahib, Ghaziabad, Hosur, Nagpur, Puducherry, Thane, Vadodara), covering engineering & design and manufacturing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Head of Talent Acquisition- India & Middle East

about.description: Air Products & Chemicals's India footprint covers Pune, Ahmedabad, Bankura, Fatehgarh Sahib, Ghaziabad, Hosur, Nagpur, Puducherry, Thane and Vadodara, spanning engineering & design and manufacturing. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all fifteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Air Products & Chemicals operate in India?
faq.a: Air Products & Chemicals operates 12 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Air Products & Chemicals have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Air Products & Chemicals's India GCC footprint spans Pune, Ahmedabad, Bankura, Fatehgarh Sahib, Ghaziabad, Hosur, Nagpur, Puducherry, Thane and Vadodara.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Air Products & Chemicals run in India?
faq.a: Air Products & Chemicals runs engineering & design and manufacturing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Air Products & Chemicals's India GCCs?
faq.a: Air Products & Chemicals's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Air Products & Chemicals's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 15 leaders at Air Products & Chemicals's India centers, across Finance, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
